tier0_casual.text: I guess we're just ignoring that one. Cool.
Snoozed. No judgment. Okay, a little judgment.
First one? Bold move. I'll allow it.
And so it begins. That's one snooze on the board.
Swept under the rug. For now.

tier1_mild.text: Oh, another one? Cool cool cool.
Two snoozes. I'm keeping count now.
That's the second one. I see you.
Building quite the collection there, huh?
Again? Fine. I'll remind you again later.

tier2_medium.text: Third snooze. That's a pattern now.
You know these come back, right? They always come back.
I'm starting to take this personally.

tier3_hot.text: Why even make reminders at this point?
Four snoozes. I'm not mad. I'm disappointed. Actually no, I'm mad.
You're basically just swiping for sport now.
The snooze button isn't a to-do list, Eddie.
At this rate, just delete the reminder. Be honest with yourself.

tier4_nuclear.text: Five snoozes. I'm not even mad, I'm impressed.
This is a snooze championship and you're in first place. Congratulations.
I quit. Find yourself a new AI. I can't do this anymore.
You know what? Snooze everything. Snooze your life. I'm done.
I need therapy after this. Robot therapy. You've broken me.

tier5_last.text: And that's the last one. Every single reminder snoozed. You absolute menace.
Zero remaining. You did it. You snoozed everything. I'm nominating you for an award.
The last one falls. Perfect score. I hope you're proud.
And the crowd goes wild. Every reminder, snoozed. The streak is complete.
That's all of them. I'll just be over here. In the corner. Crying.

rapid_fire.text: Whoa whoa slow down! You're just mowing through these!
Speed snoozer over here! Pace yourself!
Back to back to back? Really?!
Slow down! I can't even keep up with your disregard!
You're on a roll! A terrible, terrible roll!

repeat_reminder.text: This one again? You snoozed this one yesterday too.
Déjà vu. Same reminder, same snooze. I'm noticing a trend.
You've snoozed this one before. Multiple times. I have receipts.
This reminder has more snooze history than a broken alarm clock.
Again? This reminder is basically your nemesis at this point.

complete.text: Well look at you being productive.
Done! Filed! Forgotten! By me, not by you probably.
One down. How many to go? Don't ask.
And THAT is how it's done.
Marking that off before you change your mind.

agent_filler.text: Hmm. Let me look into that.
Let me think about that for a sec.
